name: C_RENT23560_001 - Open Create Group Modal
description: Verify the Create Group modal opens from the Groups view
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Groups view
steps: Click the "+ Create Group" button
expected_result: The Create Group modal is displayed

name: C_RENT23560_002 - Modal Title Displayed
description: Verify the modal heading reads "Create Group"
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Observe the modal header text
expected_result: The header text reads "Create Group"

name: C_RENT23560_003 - Group Name Field Present
description: Verify the Group Name field is present
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Locate the Name field
expected_result: A text input labeled "Group Name" is visible and enabled

name: C_RENT23560_004 - Group Name Required
description: Verify submitting with an empty Group Name shows an error
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Leave Name blank | Click "Save"
expected_result: Error "Group name is required" is displayed

name: C_RENT23560_005 - Group Name Max Length
description: Verify the Name field enforces 255 characters maximum
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Enter 256 characters in the Name field | Click "Save"
expected_result: Input is capped at 255 or a validation error appears

name: C_RENT23560_006 - Description Field Present
description: Verify the Description textarea is present
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Locate the Description field
expected_result: A textarea labeled "Description" is visible

name: C_RENT23560_007 - Description Optional
description: Verify the group saves when Description is empty
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open with a valid Name
steps: Leave Description blank | Click "Save"
expected_result: Group is created successfully without a description

name: C_RENT23560_008 - Members Field Present
description: Verify the Members selection field is present
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Locate the Members field
expected_result: A multi-select or search-input for Members is visible

name: C_RENT23560_009 - Add Single Member
description: Verify a single member can be added to a group
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Click the Members field | Search for a user | Select them | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is created with one member

name: C_RENT23560_010 - Add Multiple Members
description: Verify multiple members can be added at once
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Add three different users via the Members field | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is created with all three members

name: C_RENT23560_011 - Remove Member Before Save
description: Verify a selected member can be removed before saving
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open with two members added
steps: Click the remove icon on one member chip
expected_result: The member is removed from the selection; the other remains

name: C_RENT23560_012 - Cancel Button Closes Modal
description: Verify Cancel closes the modal without creating a group
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open with data filled
steps: Click "Cancel"
expected_result: The modal closes; no new group is listed in the Groups view

name: C_RENT23560_013 - ESC Key Closes Modal
description: Verify pressing Escape closes the modal
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Press the Escape key
expected_result: The modal closes without saving

name: C_RENT23560_014 - Save Creates Group
description: Verify Save creates the group and closes the modal
preconditions: The Create Group modal has a valid Name and at least one member
steps: Click "Save"
expected_result: Modal closes and the new group appears in the Groups list

name: C_RENT23560_015 - Duplicate Group Name Warning
description: Verify a warning appears for duplicate group names
preconditions: A group named "QA Team" already exists
steps: Enter "QA Team" in the Name field | Click "Save"
expected_result: Warning "A group with this name already exists" is shown

name: C_RENT23560_016 - Spinner While Saving
description: Verify a loading indicator is shown during the save operation
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open with valid data
steps: Click "Save" and observe button state
expected_result: A spinner is shown on the Save button while the API call is in progress

name: C_RENT23560_017 - API Failure Error Message
description: Verify an error message is shown on server failure
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open | Server returns 500
steps: Enter valid data | Click "Save" | Simulate server failure
expected_result: Error message "Failed to create group. Please try again." is displayed

name: C_RENT23560_018 - Permissions Field Present
description: Verify the Permissions field is visible in the modal
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Locate the Permissions section
expected_result: A field or section labeled "Permissions" is visible with selectable options

name: C_RENT23560_019 - Default Permission Level
description: Verify the default permission level is "Viewer"
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Observe the Permissions field initial state
expected_result: The "Viewer" permission is selected by default

name: C_RENT23560_020 - Change Permission to Editor
description: Verify selecting "Editor" permission is saved correctly
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Select "Editor" from the Permissions field | Fill Name | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is created with Editor-level permissions

name: C_RENT23560_021 - Change Permission to Admin
description: Verify selecting "Admin" permission is saved correctly
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open | Current user has Admin rights
steps: Select "Admin" from the Permissions field | Fill Name | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is created with Admin-level permissions

name: C_RENT23560_022 - Search Members by Name
description: Verify typing in the Members field filters users by name
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open | Multiple users exist
steps: Type a partial name in the Members search field
expected_result: Only users matching the search string are listed in the dropdown

name: C_RENT23560_023 - Search Members by Email
description: Verify users can be found by email in the Members search
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Type a partial email address in the Members field
expected_result: Matching users are listed; selecting one adds them to the group

name: C_RENT23560_024 - No Members Found State
description: Verify a "no results" state is shown when member search yields nothing
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Type a string matching no user in the Members field
expected_result: A "No users found" message is shown inside the dropdown

name: C_RENT23560_025 - Group Color/Icon Selection
description: Verify the modal offers a color or icon selection for the group
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Locate the color or icon picker
expected_result: A color swatch or icon picker is visible and clickable

name: C_RENT23560_026 - Selected Color Is Saved
description: Verify the chosen group color persists after saving
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open with a color selected
steps: Select a non-default color | Fill Name | Click "Save"
expected_result: The new group displays the chosen color in the Groups list

name: C_RENT23560_027 - Modal Overlay Does Not Dismiss
description: Verify clicking outside does not dismiss modal with unsaved data
preconditions: The Create Group modal has data entered
steps: Click outside the modal on the overlay
expected_result: The modal stays open; a discard prompt may be shown

name: C_RENT23560_028 - Keyboard Navigation
description: Verify all modal fields are Tab-navigable
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Press Tab from the Group Name field
expected_result: Focus cycles through Name → Description → Members → Permissions → Cancel → Save in order

name: C_RENT23560_029 - Accessibility ARIA Roles
description: Verify the modal and its fields carry correct ARIA roles
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Inspect with a screen reader or accessibility tool
expected_result: The modal has role="dialog" and all inputs have associated labels

name: C_RENT23560_030 - Form Reset After Cancel and Reopen
description: Verify modal fields are blank when reopened after Cancel
preconditions: The Create Group modal was opened and cancelled
steps: Reopen the Create Group modal
expected_result: All fields are empty; no prior input is retained

name: C_RENT23560_031 - Newly Created Group Appears in List
description: Verify the Groups list refreshes immediately after creation
preconditions: No groups exist or the list is at the last observed state
steps: Create a new group via the modal | Close modal
expected_result: The new group is visible at the top of the Groups list without a manual page refresh

name: C_RENT23560_032 - Created By Column Shows Creator
description: Verify the "Created By" column in the Groups list shows the logged-in user
preconditions: A new group has just been created
steps: Navigate to the Groups list | Locate the new group
expected_result: The "Created By" field shows the username of the user who created the group

name: C_RENT23560_033 - Created At Timestamp Accurate
description: Verify the "Created At" timestamp reflects the creation time
preconditions: A new group has just been created
steps: Check the "Created At" field on the new group in the list
expected_result: The timestamp is within 60 seconds of the actual creation time and uses the user's timezone

name: C_RENT23560_034 - Edit Group After Creation
description: Verify an existing group can be edited via the Edit option
preconditions: A group named "Dev Team" exists
steps: Click the overflow menu on "Dev Team" | Click "Edit" | Change Name to "Dev Team 2" | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is updated and displays the new name "Dev Team 2"

name: C_RENT23560_035 - Delete Single Group
description: Verify a group can be deleted via the overflow menu
preconditions: A group exists
steps: Click the overflow menu on a group | Click "Delete" | Confirm
expected_result: The group is removed from the Groups list

name: C_RENT23560_036 - Delete Confirmation Dialog
description: Verify a confirmation dialog appears before deleting a group
preconditions: A group exists
steps: Click "Delete" from the group overflow menu
expected_result: A confirmation dialog asks "Are you sure you want to delete this group?" with Confirm and Cancel buttons

name: C_RENT23560_037 - Cancel Delete Keeps Group
description: Verify cancelling the delete confirmation does not delete the group
preconditions: A group exists | The delete confirmation dialog is open
steps: Click "Cancel" in the delete confirmation dialog
expected_result: The dialog closes; the group remains in the list

name: C_RENT23560_038 - Bulk Delete Groups
description: Verify multiple groups can be deleted at once
preconditions: At least two groups exist
steps: Select two groups using checkboxes | Click "Delete" in the bulk toolbar | Confirm
expected_result: Both groups are removed from the list

name: C_RENT23560_039 - Group Member Count Displayed
description: Verify the Groups list shows the number of members per group
preconditions: A group with 3 members exists
steps: Navigate to the Groups list | Locate the group
expected_result: A "Members" column or badge shows "3"

name: C_RENT23560_040 - Add Member to Existing Group
description: Verify a member can be added to an already-created group
preconditions: A group exists with one member
steps: Open the group detail | Click "Add Member" | Search and select a new user | Save
expected_result: The group now shows two members

name: C_RENT23560_041 - Remove Member From Existing Group
description: Verify a member can be removed from an existing group
preconditions: A group exists with two members
steps: Open the group detail | Click Remove on one member | Confirm
expected_result: The group now shows one member

name: C_RENT23560_042 - Group Visible to All Admins
description: Verify newly created groups are visible to all admin users
preconditions: Two admin accounts exist (Admin A creates the group)
steps: Admin B logs in and navigates to Groups view
expected_result: The group created by Admin A is visible to Admin B

name: C_RENT23560_043 - Non-Admin Cannot Create Group
description: Verify a user with Viewer permission cannot access Create Group
preconditions: A user with Viewer role is logged in
steps: Attempt to access the Create Group button or URL directly
expected_result: The Create Group button is hidden or the action returns a 403 Forbidden error

name: C_RENT23560_044 - Group Name Trimmed on Save
description: Verify leading and trailing whitespace in the Group Name is trimmed
preconditions: The Create Group modal is open
steps: Enter "  QA Group  " (with spaces) in the Name field | Click "Save"
expected_result: The group is created with the name "QA Group" (trimmed) and no error is raised
